description.overview: Weimaraners are elegant, athletic dogs with distinctive gray coats. Originally bred for hunting large game, they're now popular family companions for active owners.
description.temperament: Weimaraners are friendly, fearless, and energetic. They bond closely with their families and can suffer separation anxiety.
description.health: Prone to bloat, hip dysplasia, and gastric issues. Deep-chested breed—learn bloat symptoms.
description.exercise: Very high exercise needs. Need vigorous daily activity. Excellent hiking and running partners.

verdict.summary: Beautiful, athletic dogs that need extensive exercise. Weimaraners are loyal companions for active owners but can develop separation anxiety. Not for couch potatoes or those who work long hours.
